visuals.title: Signal Handling Process Flow
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Signal Handling Process Flow
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Signal Functions</text>

  <!-- Input Signal -->
  <rect x="50" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Input Signal
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Function Processor -->
  <rect x="180" y="70" width="120" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="240" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="white" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    f(x)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Output Signal -->
  <rect x="320" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="370" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Output Signal
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow from Input to Function -->
  <path d="M150 100 L180 100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrow from Function to Output -->
  <path d="M300 100 L320 100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Example Signals -->
  <!-- Input Wave -->
  <path d="M70 150 L90 130 L110 150 L130 130 L150 150" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Output Wave -->
  <path d="M340 150 L360 170 L380 150 L400 170 L420 150" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Transformation Label -->
  <text x="240" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Signal Transformation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Function Types -->
  <rect x="50" y="220" width="120" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Amplification
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="190" y="220" width="120" height="30" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="250" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Filtering
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="330" y="220" width="120" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="390" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Modulation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
